Who I Am
About Me

Hi, I'm Daniel Ricardo. I'm a recent high school graduate from Jakarta with a huge interest in math, physics, and logic. Over the past few years, I've spent a lot of time competing in national science olympiads, where I managed to bring home several gold medals.

Right now, I'm deepening my skills in Python as I prepare to move to Melbourne, Australia, for my Information Technology degree. For me, everything comes down to problem-solving, and I'm genuinely excited to see how I can use math and code to build cool things in the future.

Leadership & Experience
Experience
2024 – 2025
President, Student Council (OSIS)
SMA Bunda Mulia Kalideres · Jakarta
Led the student council for the 2024/2025 academic year, representing student interests to school administration, coordinating inter-department activities, and overseeing school-wide programs and events.
Certified by Principal Leadership Organization
2024
Head Committee — Bunda Mulia Competition 2024
SMA Bunda Mulia Kalideres · Jakarta
Led the organizing committee for the inaugural Bunda Mulia Competition — the first inter-school competition ever held at SMA Bunda Mulia Kalideres. The event successfully attracted participants from approximately 30 schools across the region.
